---
name: Feature request
description: Suggest a new component, API, or enhancement aligned with the GOV.UK Design System
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A short description of the feature or component you’d like.

## Design System reference

Link to the relevant [GOV.UK Design System](https://design-system.service.gov.uk/) pattern or component (if applicable):

- e.g. https://design-system.service.gov.uk/components/button/

## Proposed API or behaviour

How you’d expect to use it in code or configure it:

```tsx
// Example usage
```

## Rationale

Why this would be useful (e.g. missing pattern, common use case, accessibility improvement).

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or existing workarounds you’ve thought about.

## Additional context

Screenshots, examples from other libraries, or links to design specs.

🙌 **Interested in implementing this?** [See how to contribute as a volunteer](https://github.com/rottitime/govuk-design-react/blob/main/VOLUNTEERS.md).
